title: murdannia zeylanica var. longiscapa
intro: Murdannia zeylanica var. longiscapa, also known as long-spiked Murdannia or Long-spiked flag lily, is a plant species belonging to the family Commelinaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Murdannia zeylanica var. longiscapa include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its role in promoting wound healing and immune function. Herbal preparations of Murdannia zeylanica var. longiscapa include decoctions, infusions, and topical applications, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
